case_title: QUAN YI LIN VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2013 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,401.83 FILED BY LIN, QUAN YI AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-18-2013 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JOYCELYN PEREZ--CCSF. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---QUINFU LIN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIN, QUAN YI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
